Event: Darkness Castle Siege Feb 2025
Event Date: 09/06/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A228


Other locations the gear can be found
Adventurer Challenge - Castle Siege
Star Shield Artifact

Triggers: Once in a while

Angered Earth
3 random enemies become entangled in a spiky vine. They can't move or use any abilities (except those granted by the equipped set) for 4 sec. The entangled enemies also have exhaustion applied to them every second. They take physical damage equal to 125% of the artifact owner's attack every second. When an enemy is exhausted, their damage and attack speed are reduced by 15%. The exhaustion lasts 4 sec. Stacks up to 4 times.
For the duration of the ability, all enemy units in a small radius around the targets take 265000 magic damage every second and have 1 random positive effects removed from them.

Requirements: 90-100
